description: Stand up an HTTPS-reachable MCP server with Auth0 M2M authentication, from Asgard primitives. Composes an ECR repo, an Auth0 M2M app, and a load-balanced HTTPS service. The result is an /mcp URL agents reach with a Bearer token. The agent fills the inputs and issues each request_resource itself.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: OCI image for the MCP server; listens on 8080 with /healthz. Use immutable :sha tags.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.description: Two or more subnets across AZs.

inputs.name: tenant
inputs.description: Auth0 tenant for the M2M app.

steps.description: M2M client agents use to obtain Bearer tokens.
The MCP server behind an HTTPS load balancer.
